channel.title: Design Documents :: Choria Configuration Manager
channel.description: LLM generated design documents for resources

item.title: Archive Type
item.description: Archive resource for downloading and extracting archives

item.title: Apply Type
item.description: Apply resource for composing manifests from reusable parts

item.title: File Type
item.description: File resource for managing files and directories

item.title: Package Type
item.description: Package resource for system package management

item.title: Scaffold Type
item.description: Scaffold resource for template directory rendering

item.title: Service Type
item.description: Service resource for system service management

item.title: Adding a Type
item.description: How to add a new resource type to CCM

item.title: Docs Style Guide
item.description: Define writing conventions for CCM documentation
